summary: F1 and F3 are closed, but F2 is not fully closed: the SSE endpoint still emits wildcard CORS, so this slice should not ship as approved yet.

findings.title: SSE stream still sets wildcard CORS despite the same-origin hardening requirement
findings.recommendation: Remove the `access-control-allow-origin: "*"` header from the `/api/runs/:id/stream` response so the SSE nonce is not exposed via permissive CORS. The strict same-origin guard at the top of `handle()` is present, and the `/resume` nonce check is present, but this header means the round-1 F2 fix is not fully implemented as requested.
